narrative:
Precinct Toledo 2C (precinct in Lucas County) has 749 registered voters, with 73.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.4 percentage points.
